backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, with a passphrase check and blob storage mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that resets the actor's correctCode field to 'Nobita' during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-sentence summaries describing each component or page's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Doraemon Secret World app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, authentication guards, and global UI elements like StarBackground and FloatingMusicControl.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicCon: Fixed bottom-right floating button component for toggling BGM playback and adjusting volume via an expandable slider, using the useBGM hook.
frontend/src/components/GlassPanel.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card component with configurable Doraemon-themed neon glow borders, optional float animation, hover lift effect, and click handler.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Authenticated app shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bar, and logout functionality wrapping all protected routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Fixed decorative background component that renders 80 randomly positioned twinkling stars and 8 floating bubbles using CSS custom properties for animation timing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using TanStack Query, supporting both anonymous and identity-authenticated actors and invalidating dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useBGM.ts: Custom React hook that manages background music playback using an HTML Audio element, exposing play/pause/toggle controls and volume adjustment for a Doraemon BGM file.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and exposing login/clear functions to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on memories, quotes, fun facts, messages, and code verification, all delegating to the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures a Doraemon-themed OKLCH color palette via CSS variables, and defines Tailwind utility classes for glassmorphism and neon glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat page component that displays a message thread with bot and user bubbles, handles user input, saves messages to the backend, and simulates bot responses with a typing indicator.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that renders a hero section with a Doraemon avatar and a grid of navigation portals linking to the app's main sections, also triggering initial data seeding on load.
frontend/src/pages/FriendshipPage.tsx: Displays a themed page about Nobita and Doraemon's friendship, featuring six quote panels with scroll-triggered slide-in animations and a hero image.
frontend/src/pages/games/MazePage.tsx: A maze game page that generates a random maze using recursive backtracking and lets the player navigate with keyboard arrow/WASD keys, tracking moves and elapsed time until reaching the goal cell.
frontend/src/pages/games/MemoryMatchPage: A memory card matching game page with 12 emoji pairs that handles card flipping, match detection, move counting, and a win condition when all pairs are matched.
frontend/src/pages/games/SlidingPuzzlePa: A 3x3 sliding puzzle game page where tiles are shuffled and the player clicks adjacent tiles to slide them into the correct order, tracking moves and elapsed time.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Renders a games hub page listing three Doraemon-themed mini-games (Sliding Puzzle, Maze Adventure, Memory Match) as navigable cards with descriptions and how-to tips.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: Implements an authentication lock screen where users enter a secret code, verified via API, before being redirected to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesPage.tsx: Shows a memories gallery fetched from the backend and provides a form to add new titled memory entries with a date and content.
frontend/src/pages/QuotesPage.tsx: Displays randomly fetched Doraemon quotes and fun facts in two side-by-side panels, each with a refresh button that triggers a fade-out/re-fetch animation.
frontend/src/utils/botResponses.ts: Defines categorized arrays of Doraemon-themed bot response strings (general, love, friendship, memories, Doraemon-specific, questions, greetings) used to generate chatbot replies.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Provides sample seed data arrays for memories, quotes, and fun facts with a Doraemon theme, used to pre-populate the application's backend or UI with demo content.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with a Doraemon color palette (oklch-based), custom fonts (Orbitron, Space Grotesk, Nunito), glow/glass box shadows, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and tailwindcss-animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Doraemon-themed AI gift app project at schema version 1.0.0 (state v5), listing architectural notes, known issues, and all existing implemented features such as the visual theme, BGM player, access gate, memories section, and more.
